title: Fragrant Filipino Pork Skewers
description: A sweet and savory Filipino dish featuring tender pork skewers in a rich barbeque sauce, served with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together pineapple juice, coconut milk, barbeque sauce, brown sugar, fish sauce, and black pepper.
Add the garlic and cilantro to the bowl and mix well.
Add the pork shoulder to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the pork onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
Baste the skewers with the remaining marinade during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot with steamed vegetables and your choice of sides.
Garnish with additional cilantro and serve immediately.
